title: MBA (Agribusiness Management)
content: Students having MAT / XAT / CMAT / NMAT / GMAT/ CUET Score will be given preference in merit 01 To enable students to understand the socio-economic, technological, ecological and environmental issues affecting agriculture and allied sectors in general and agro-based industries in particular. 02 To equip students with required conceptual and interpersonal skills for managerial decision making. 03 To inculcate positive thinking and problem solving skills to demonstrate leadership & team building in cross-cultural environment. 04 To develop socially responsible and ethical business leadership capabilities who can perform without compromising integrity, honesty and fairness 01 Have good communication skills 02 Have strong domain knowledge 03 Be capable of decision making (problem solving) in structured and unstructured environment 04 Be socially and ethically responsible managers 05 Demonstrate leadership & team building in cross-cultural environment 06 Have ability to take risk and become entrepreneurs 01 Graduates will grow personally and professionally to be successful in dynamic business environment globally. 02 Graduate will lead with creative, analytical and entrepreneurial skills to help organizations achieve a competitive advantage. 03 Graduate will contribute as socially and ethically responsible citizen or the sustainable development of environment and society at large. 01 Get managerial training for running agribusiness. 02 Recognize the elements of an agriculture business strategy. 03 To familiarize students with the setting in which the agricultural industry is run. 04 To educate students on the effects of macro- and micro-environmental factors on agriculture. Students having MAT / XAT / CMAT / NMAT / GMAT/ CUET Score will be given preference in merit
